changes_made: Renamed k8s_audit_policy_captures_metadata to k8s_audit_policy_metadata_captured for consistency with naming conventions
review_notes: The functions are applicable to Kubernetes as they relate to audit logging, which is a critical component of Kubernetes security. The original names mostly followed the naming conventions, but a minor change was made to improve clarity and consistency. The functions map well to the control's requirements for audit record generation and time correlation.
naming_improvements: Ensure function names consistently use past tense for actions, e.g., 'captured' instead of 'captures'
title: Audit Record Generation - Audit record generation | system - wide and time - correlated audit trail compil
step1_reasoning: The control AU-12(1) focuses on audit record generation and system-wide, time-correlated audit trail compilation. In Kubernetes, this can be mapped to ensuring that audit logging is enabled, logs are retained for a specific period, audit policies capture necessary metadata, and logs can be correlated over time. These checks ensure that Kubernetes audit logs are comprehensive and can be used for system-wide analysis.
